name: Bioluminescent Caverns
description: Glowing fungi and creatures illuminate this cavernous section. Traps and combat rooms here have a 'Glowing' condition, attracting luminescent enemies.

name: Lava Pits
description: Rivers of molten lava flow through this fiery section. Combat rooms feature fire-based enemies and hazards.

name: Icy Catacombs
description: Frozen tunnels and chambers make up this frigid section. Traps and combat rooms have an 'Icy' condition, with frost-based enemies.

name: Shadow Halls
description: Dark, mysterious corridors where light is scarce. Combat rooms have 'Shadow' enemies that thrive in darkness.

name: Crystal Caves
description: Sparkling crystal formations fill this section. Utility rooms may reveal crystal-based enhancements.

name: Dead End
description: This path leads nowhere. The dungeon seems to have closed off this route for now.
